text_block_list.text: One day just before tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You're leaving the school?! Whaddya mean?!

Hearing Hishi Amazon's flustered voice booming down from the
rooftop, I hurry upstairs to look into the situation.

There, I see Amazon speaking to the student that she had been
training with previously.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Do you know what you're saying right now? You can't be serious...

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I am. I can't stick around and pretend any longer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: How can you say that?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Remember what you told me? When you first came to see me in the
dorm?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You said you had a longtime rival that you wanted to beat in the
Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What happened to all that fiery passion?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...It's gone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The two of us aren't rivals anymore! The game's already over! She
won!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whaddya mean "over"?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it'd been nagging at me for a while. After coming to this
school, she just kept getting faster. But my improvement was little to
none.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You were even kind enough to help me out... but it was no use.
Yesterday, I lost to her by ten lengths.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, that is a pretty big margin...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you never know! In the next race, you might beat her by ten lengths!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's impossible, and you know it!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for shouting, Hishiama.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But some contests are just obvious from the beginning. So I'm putting
an end to this pointless rivalry between us.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Well, I need to go. Thank you for everything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha—hey! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: "Impossible"? "Over"? How can she say that?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... I really dropped the ball there, huh? Some dorm mom I am,
not being able to cheer up one of the youngsters.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know for a fact that her goal's not impossible. But lecturing her isn't
gonna help anything.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Argh, dammit! What am I supposed to do now?

Considering Amazon isn't the least bit intimidated by competition
herself, I can understand how this would be a difficult problem to
solve.
As she wracks her brain for the answer...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: There you are, Hishiama! I've been looking all over for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, if it ain't Biko. What's up?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
We're racing on the same day of tryouts, right? The groups were just
announced, so I thought I'd let you know the big news!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Get this—you're in the same group as Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?!

She's a powerful Umamusume who has already caught the attention of
every trainer around.

Her older sister, Biwa Hiyahide, has been tearing up the track since
her own debut, but Brian is said to possess even greater potential.
choice_data_list: (What an opponent to go up against...)
(What an opponent to go up against...)

text_block_list.text:
I brace myself, fully expecting Amazon to be shaken to the core.
However...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Got it. Thanks, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Talk about perfect timing!
With a fearless grin, she dashes off at full speed.
I hurry after her, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hnghyaaah! Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did you follow me here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's it look like? I'm training! Guess I oughta start out with fifty or
so hill sprints.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, maybe that's not enough. I mean, this is Brian we're talkin'
about. I'll have to train like hell to go one-on-one against her!
choice_data_list: You're not the least bit scared?
You're not the least bit scared?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Course I'm not! Who do you think I am?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Besides... I'm not good with words like Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So the best I can do for somebody in a funk... is just to show 'em how
it's done.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But even so, I'm gonna pull out all the stops.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing out there is impossible right from the get-go! You never
know the outcome of a match 'til you give it a try!

Amazon makes a deeply heartfelt declaration, her eyes burning with
resolve.

I find myself wanting to catch a glimpse of the future that she is so
intently focused on...
choice_data_list: Mind if I help you train?
Mind if I help you train?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, really? You sure? Haha, but you're not even my trainer, ya big
weirdo!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind one bit—in fact, that'd be a huge help. Go ahead and
whip me into shape!

Thus, we agree for me to oversee Hishi Amazon's training sessions
until tryouts.
